title: Creating a Persona for an E-commerce Store Owner
scenario: Design a persona for an e-commerce store owner who is experienced in selling products online and is looking to expand their customer base. The owner's name is Rachel, and they are 30 years old. The persona should include demographics, goals, challenges, and pain points. Ensure the persona is 150-300 words, written in the first person, and is focused on the owner's e-commerce business. Use a professional tone and a detailed style.
constraints: Must be written in the first person

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the persona description accurately reflect the provided context?
Is the tone of the persona description professional and detailed?
Is the persona description within the specified word count range?
